title: Release 1.1.5 same-task A/B benchmark
summary: Release 1.1.5 adds same task A/B benchmarking. kage benchmark compare task compares baseline manual repo discovery against Kage recall plus code graph on the same repo/task, reporting estimated tokens saved, context redu
body:
Release 1.1.5 adds same-task A/B benchmarking. kage benchmark --compare --task compares baseline manual repo discovery against Kage recall plus code graph on the same repo/task, reporting estimated tokens saved, context reduction, rediscovery steps saved, time saved, full-file reads avoided, recall/code graph hits, evidence files, memory packets, code facts, and caveats. MCP exposes kage_benchmark_compare. Kage self-benchmark for PR readiness task showed 115,334 baseline tokens vs 1,906 Kage context tokens, 98% smaller context, 9 rediscovery steps avoided, and 504 estimated seconds saved. Verified by npm test, npm pack --dry-run, and npm publish.
Verified by: npm test; npm --cache /tmp/kage-npm-cache pack --dry-run; npm publish; kage benchmark --compare
